title: RNA Extraction Protocol for Shorea
author: mpfsum
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.b2ipqcdn

steps.title: Weigh BUD 40 mg, (25-40 mg)...
steps.instruction: Weigh BUD 40 mg, (25-40 mg) or LEAF 60 mg, (50-70 mg) and transfer into a 1.5 mL tube.

steps.title: Ground in CTAB buffer (3% CTAB, 1
steps.instruction: Ground in CTAB buffer (3% CTAB, 1.4 M NaCl, 20 mM EDTA, 100 mM Tris–HCl pH 8.0, 0.2% b-mercaptoethanol) using tissuelyzer.

steps.title: Incubate at 60 °C for 00:45:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at 60 °C for 00:45:00 .

steps.title: Add 1 volume of chloroform
steps.instruction: Add 1 volume of chloroform. Mix by vortex but not too vigorous. Ensure that the two phases of the mixture are homogenized well.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 5000 rpm, Room temperature, 1 minute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 5000 rpm, Room temperature, 1 minute . Transfer the supernatant into a new 1.5 mL tube.

steps.title: Add 2/3 volume of isopropanol
steps.instruction: Add 2/3 volume of isopropanol. Mix gently (turning the tubes upside down 00:02:00 ).

steps.title: Centrifuge 5000 rpm, Room temperature, 5 minutes Discard solution carefully
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 5000 rpm, Room temperature, 5 minutes Discard solution carefully. Formation of white to translucent pellet.

steps.title: Add 700 µL ethanol
steps.instruction: Add 700 µL ethanol. Mix gently (flicking the tube) until the pellet no longer stick to the tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge 5000 rpm, Room temperature, 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 5000 rpm, Room temperature, 5 minutes . Discard solution carefully.

steps.title: Air dry the pellet 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Air dry the pellet 00:01:00 . Repeat Washing if necessary.

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet in 50 µL RNAse-free water
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet in 50 µL RNAse-free water. Flick the tube until the pellet is no longer visible. If the pellet is difficult to dissolve, leave it for ~30 min before flicking again. If it still does not dissolve, add more RNAse-free water AND adjust the subsequent steps accordingly.

steps.title: Removed gDNA using Turbo DNA-free Kit...
steps.instruction: Removed gDNA using Turbo DNA-free Kit Invitrogen - Thermo Fisher Catalog #AM1907 . Follow the manufacturer's protocol.

steps.title: Purification is done using RNeasy Plant...
steps.instruction: Purification is done using RNeasy Plant Mini Kit Qiagen Catalog #74904 with minor adjustment to the protocol. Add 350 µL RLT buffer. Mix gently (flicking).

steps.title: Add 250 µL absolute ethanol
steps.instruction: Add 250 µL absolute ethanol. Mix gently (flicking).

steps.title: Transfer the solution into RNeasy Mini Spin column
steps.instruction: Transfer the solution into RNeasy Mini Spin column. Centrifuge 10000 rpm, Room temperature, 15 seconds . Discard the flow through.

steps.title: Add 700 µL RW1 buffer to the column
steps.instruction: Add 700 µL RW1 buffer to the column. Centrifuge 10000 rpm, Room temperature, 15 seconds . Discard the flow through.

steps.title: Add 500 µL RPE buffer to the column
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL RPE buffer to the column. Centrifuge 10000 rpm, Room temperature, 15 seconds . Discard the flow through.

steps.title: Add 500 µL RPE buffer to the column
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL RPE buffer to the column. Centrifuge 10000 rpm, Room temperature, 2 minutes . Discard the flow through.

steps.title: Replace the collection tube
steps.instruction: Replace the collection tube. Centrifuge 14000 rpm, Room temperature, 1 minute to further dry the membrane.

steps.title: Replace the collection tube with a new 1
steps.instruction: Replace the collection tube with a new 1.5 mL tube. Add 50 µL RNAse-free water directly onto the membrane. Incubate at Room temperature for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Centrifuge 10000 rpm, Room temperature, 1 minute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 10000 rpm, Room temperature, 1 minute . Store the extracted RNA in -20 °C or -80 °C for longer storage.

steps.title: Evaluate the RNA quality using Agilent 2100 Bioanalyzer
steps.instruction: Evaluate the RNA quality using Agilent 2100 Bioanalyzer.
